des.siege_tools.ammo_kit:
Right-click a teammate to refill ammo
Sneak + Right-click to deploy an ammo crate
message.siege_tools.ammo_kit.hint: §7Sneak + Right-click to deploy, or right-click a teammate to refill
message.siege_tools.ammo_kit.area_refill: §a[Ammo Kit] Received ammunition from nearby ammo crate!
